turns.name: Discover AD scope
turns.user: Discover AD scope for this run and list which DCs are currently reachable for live checks.

turns.name: Replication baseline
turns.user: Run a replication baseline and identify the most impacted DCs first.

turns.name: EventLog correlation window
turns.user: Correlate impacted DCs with Directory Service and System event evidence in the same time window.

turns.name: Continue across remaining DCs
turns.user: Continue the same event correlation for every remaining discovered DC in this turn. Do not stop after the first failure.

turns.name: Retry failed targets once
turns.user: For targets that failed, retry once with narrower time range and continue with all others.

turns.name: Cross-DC evidence matrix
turns.user: Return per-DC matrix: replication state, event evidence found/missing, earliest UTC, latest UTC, confidence.

turns.name: Root cause families
turns.user: Classify likely root cause families with confidence and strongest supporting evidence.

turns.name: Immediate validation plan
turns.user: Provide a prioritized 30-minute validation plan with exact checks.

turns.name: Follow-up rerun plan
turns.user: Provide rerun plan that verifies improvement and catches partial/unfinished evidence paths.

turns.name: Compact final summary
turns.user: Summarize in 6 bullets with UTC markers, participating DC count, unresolved blockers, and next action.
